content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Mimics classic storytelling structures, reinforcing course themes.
• Gives students a powerful emotional connection to their choices.
• Ensures that every student experiences a “turning point” moment.

📜 2. The Rebellion Path – Overthrowing the Professor & Reshaping the Final Essay

📜 A secret path allows certain players to lead a rebellion against “The Professor (God).”

✔ Only players who have chosen “The Fallen Angel” archetype may trigger this path.
✔ A rebellion must be carefully orchestrated—a solo attempt will fail unless they gather a faction.
✔ If successful, the rebels rewrite the final essay guidelines for their entire faction.

📜 How the Rebellion Works
✔ A Fallen Angel player must form a secret faction (minimum of 3 members).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 275 (chunk 275/555)
